things.name: Command Ridge
things.description: Highest point on the island with a WWII Japanese command post and radio station

things.name: Phosphate Pinnacles (Topside)
things.description: Vast moonscape of jagged white coral limestone pillars left by phosphate mining

things.name: Anibare Bay
things.description: Beautiful lagoon bay on the eastern side of the island - Nauru's best beach

things.name: Menen Hotel Area
things.description: Main hotel area with the lagoon and swimming access

things.name: Nauru Parliament House
things.description: Government of the world's smallest republic

things.name: Buada Lagoon
things.description: Inland freshwater lagoon surrounded by trees - fishing and scenic walks

things.name: Japanese WWII Guns (Boe Village)
things.description: Coastal defense guns left by the Japanese occupiers

things.name: Nauru Central Hospital Historical Area
things.description: Colonial-era buildings from the German, Australian and Japanese occupation periods

things.name: Fishing for Milkfish
things.description: Traditional Nauruan pond aquaculture of milkfish - a cultural practice for centuries

things.name: Nauru Rehabilitation (First Land)
things.description: Unusual opportunity to see ecosystem restoration on the heavily mined interior
